hero.title: Choose your path to landing the right role
hero.subtitle: Whether you need a quick refresh or full support from strategy to offer, we've got you covered.
hero.metaDescription: Career coaching packages from resume overhaul to full job search support. Find the right fit for where you are.

tiers.title: Starter
tiers.body: Your resume and LinkedIn aren't working. Let's fix that fast.
tiers.ideal: Best for: You have the experience but aren't getting callbacks

bullets.label: 1:1 Strategy Session
bullets.detailBody: We'll dig into your background, identify your strongest angles, and get clear on exactly what roles you should be targeting.
detailPoints: Understand what's been holding you back

bullets.label: Complete Resume Overhaul
bullets.detailBody: We'll rebuild your resume from the ground up so it actually shows what you've accomplished — not just what you were responsible for.
detailPoints: Format that passes ATS and impresses humans

bullets.label: LinkedIn Profile Transformation
bullets.detailBody: Your headline, about section, and experience rewritten so recruiters actually reach out.
detailPoints: About section that tells your story

tiers.title: Land the Job
tiers.body: Everything in Starter, plus ongoing support while you're actively searching.
tiers.ideal: Best for: You're ready to search now and want guidance through the process

bullets.label: Everything in Starter
bullets.detailBody: Strategy session, complete resume overhaul, and LinkedIn transformation — the foundation you need.

bullets.label: Job Search Game Plan
bullets.detailBody: A practical, week-by-week system for finding opportunities and getting in front of the right people — not just applying and hoping.

bullets.label: Ongoing Check-ins
bullets.detailBody: As you start getting responses, we're there to help you navigate. Adjustments, prep, feedback — whatever you need.

tiers.title: Ultimate
tiers.body: End-to-end partnership from first strategy call to signed offer letter.
tiers.ideal: Best for: High-stakes transitions where you can't afford to wing it

bullets.label: Everything in Land the Job
bullets.detailBody: Strategy, resume, LinkedIn, search plan, and ongoing support — the full foundation.

bullets.label: Interview Preparation
bullets.detailBody: We build your story bank, run mock interviews, and make sure you walk in ready to perform — not just participate.

bullets.label: Offer & Negotiation Strategy
bullets.detailBody: When offers come in, we help you evaluate, compare, and negotiate. Most clients leave money on the table. You won't.
detailPoints: Choose the right role, not just the first one

alaCarte.title: Just need one thing?
alaCarte.subtitle: Pick exactly what you need. No packages, no extras.

items.title: Strategy Session
items.body: One focused conversation to get clear on your next move.

items.title: Resume Overhaul
items.body: A complete rebuild that shows what you've actually accomplished.

items.title: LinkedIn Transformation
items.body: Headline, about, and experience rewritten to attract the right opportunities.

items.title: Done-For-You Applications
items.body: We handle the applications so you can focus on preparation.

items.title: Job Search Game Plan
items.body: A clear system for finding opportunities and getting responses.

items.title: Interview Prep Session
items.body: Mock interview with detailed feedback and story refinement.

items.title: Ongoing Support
items.body: Weekly check-ins to keep you moving and adjust as needed.

items.question: How do I know which package is right for me?
items.answer: If you're just getting started and need your materials fixed, go with Starter. If you're actively searching and want support along the way, Land the Job is the move. If this is a major career transition and you want us in your corner through every step, Ultimate is worth it. Still not sure? Book a call and we'll help you figure it out.

items.question: Do you work with senior people or just early career?
items.answer: Most of our clients are mid-to-senior level — people with real experience who aren't being seen for what they're worth. We work with senior ICs, managers, directors, and executives across tech, finance, healthcare, and operations.

items.question: What if I'm not sure what role I want?
items.answer: That's actually more common than you'd think. Our strategy session helps you get clear on where your experience translates best. We figure it out together.

items.question: Do you help with interviews?
items.answer: Full interview prep is included in Ultimate. If you're on another package, you can add it a la carte.

items.question: What about negotiation?
items.answer: Negotiation strategy is part of Ultimate. We help you understand your leverage, prepare your ask, and handle the back-and-forth.

cta.title: Not sure where to start?
cta.body: Let's talk. We'll figure out where you are, where you want to be, and the fastest way to get there.
